# PicSpeak

> AI photography critique tool that scores photos across composition, lighting, color, impact, and technique, providing instant feedback to help photographers improve their skills.

## Docs

- [PicSpeak Homepage](https://picspeak.art): Main entry point for the AI photo critique tool, available in English, Chinese, and Japanese. Includes upload functionality and feature overview.
- [AI Photo Critique Gallery](https://picspeak.art/gallery): Public archive of AI-analyzed photos with scores and detailed feedback across five critique dimensions. Supports sorting by recommended, latest, highest-scored, and most-liked.
- [Demo Review Example](https://picspeak.art/reviews/rev_8424d4fbde054759): Canonical example of a complete AI photo critique result showing scoring structure and feedback format.

## Products

- [Pro Subscription](https://picspeak.art): Unlimited AI photo critiques for $2.99/month (promotional pricing). Includes full scoring across all five dimensions, detailed improvement suggestions, and gallery features.
- [Affiliate Program](https://picspeak.art/affiliate): 30% recurring commission on Pro subscription referrals. 30-day tracking window, managed via LemonSqueezy.

## Resources

- [Lens Notes Blog](https://picspeak.art/en/blog): Photography articles covering composition, lighting, color theory, review workflows, and AI critique methods. Six foundational articles with multilingual support.
- [AI Photo Critique as Daily Practice](https://picspeak.art/en/blog/ai-photo-critique-daily-practice): Guide explaining why frequent AI critique builds better photography habits than occasional deep reviews, with practical tips for building a sustainable review routine.
- [Five Photo Composition Checks](https://picspeak.art/en/blog/five-photo-composition-checks): Practical checklist for subject clarity, edge distractions, depth, visual balance, and visual flow. Usable during shooting and post-processing.
- [Product Updates](https://picspeak.art/updates): Changelog documenting new features, improvements, and bug fixes. Covers gallery sorting, dark theme, multi-language routes, activation codes, and scoring refinements.

## Key Facts

- Product: AI photo critique tool for photographers, creators, and students
- Scoring dimensions: Composition, lighting, color, impact, technique
- Pricing: Pro subscription at $2.99/month (promotional, 25% off from $3.99)
- Languages: English, Chinese (中文), Japanese (日本語)
- Founder: Asa Zhou (@Zzw_Prime)
- Repository: https://github.com/AsaZhou923/picspeak
- Affiliate commission: 30% recurring on referrals
